headline: X-Men '97 has what Master of the Universe is missing
summary: Marvel's X-Men '97 and Mattel's Masters of the Universe are both reviving beloved animated heroes. X-Men '97 is praised for its approach, while Masters of the Universe is getting a live-action He-Man. Both aim to capitalize on childhood nostalgia in 2026.

headline: Sealed Super Mario Bros. sells for a record $3 million
summary: A sealed copy of Super Mario Bros. fetched a record $3 million at Heritage Auctions. This new sale shatters the previous record of $2 million, also for a Super Mario Bros. copy in 2021. The sale follows a recent controversial auction.

headline: Microsoft hasn't ruled out spinning off Xbox
summary: Microsoft plans significant layoffs in its Xbox division and is reevaluating Project Helix. A new report suggests Microsoft is considering restructuring or even spinning off Xbox into a separate company. This indicates a potential major shift for the gaming giant.

headline: Bose's latest QuietComfort Ultra are $70 off, marking a new low price
summary: Bose's QuietComfort Ultra headphones are now $70 off, reaching a new low price. These second-generation headphones offer excellent noise cancellation and a foldable design. They are highly recommended for travelers and daily commuters.

headline: X-Men '97 Season 2, Episodes 1-4 Review (Spoiler-Free)
summary: The first four episodes of X-Men '97 Season 2 are reviewed as thrilling and engaging. The new season continues to deliver a winning blend of Marvel nostalgia. It also features deep character drama.

headline: Milly Alcock Says Her Supergirl Cape Was Made With Material from Christopher Reeve's Superman Suit
summary: Milly Alcock's Supergirl cape for her standalone debut features historic material. The cape incorporates fabric from Christopher Reeve's iconic Superman suit. This detail connects the new Supergirl to a legendary cinematic legacy.

headline: Jesse Eisenberg Turned Down The Social Reckoning Because He 'Has His Problems With' Mark Zuckerberg, Aaron Sorkin Says
summary: Jesse Eisenberg declined to reprise his role as Mark Zuckerberg in "The Social Reckoning." Writer-director Aaron Sorkin spent three days trying to convince him. Eisenberg reportedly has personal issues with the Facebook CEO.

headline: Xbox Reportedly Speeding Up New Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo Games as Microsoft Leaves Spinning Off the Business on the Table
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is reportedly accelerating development for new Halo, Elder Scrolls, and Fallout titles. This comes as Microsoft considers restructuring or potentially spinning off its gaming division. The move aims to boost output amidst major strategic evaluations.

headline: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed on Sunday as Tehran casts doubt on timing
summary: Trump announced a US-Iran deal signing for Sunday. However, Tehran stated an exact date has not been decided. Iran confirmed the signing would "not be tomorrow."

headline: Resident doctors cancel strike after new offer from government
summary: Resident doctors have canceled their planned strike. The decision follows a new offer presented by the government. The walkout was originally scheduled from Monday to Friday.

headline: Molly Russell's dad says PM rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
summary: The father of Molly Russell criticizes the Prime Minister for rushing social media restrictions. He believes the plans were expedited for "political reasons." Molly took her own life after viewing harmful online content.

headline: Royal Family watch Red Arrows flypast on Buckingham Palace balcony
summary: The Royal Family gathered on the Buckingham Palace balcony for the annual Red Arrows flypast. This event marks the King's official birthday celebration. Over 1,400 armed forces members participated in the display.
